title: 5 Proverbs every man of God reads before a big move
caption:
Big move ahead? Read these first.

Most men make their biggest decisions on urgency, gut feeling, and the voice inside their own head. No counsel. No stillness. No check on what's actually driving them.

Proverbs has five things to say about that.

→ Proverbs 16:9 — Your plan isn't final. God reserves the right to redirect.
→ Proverbs 11:14 — Get real men in the room. Not podcasts. Brothers who know your blind spots.
→ Proverbs 4:23 — Check what's driving you. Running toward, or away?
→ Proverbs 21:5 — Slow is faster than hasty. Urgency is a liar.
→ Proverbs 3:5–6 — Lean where it actually holds.

"Trust in the Lord with all your heart, lean not on your own understanding. In all your ways submit to him, and he will make your paths straight."

That's the whole playbook.

—

Comment "move" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.

theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
